summary: Journey Test #4 COMPLETE: Full Closure → Settlement Pipeline. All 40 tests passed (100%). Successfully tested the complete cross-phase handoff from Execution closure_ready → Settlement initiation → Collection verification → Payable commitments → Settlement ownership → Financial closure completion. All 8 settlement statuses, 5 collection statuses, 3 payable completeness values, 5 payout readiness postures, and 5 financial closure gate checks verified.

tests: Admin fast-tracks lead through all stages to booking_confirmed
All 5 postures tested: payout_ready, payout_not_ready, payout_readiness_unclear, payout_blocked_by_dispute_or_hold, payout_readiness_pending_verification
Note saved and verified in settlement data
All 5 checks verified: event_closure_complete, collection_verified, payable_commitments_captured, blockers_resolved, settlement_note_complete
POST /api/settlement/{lead_id}/complete succeeds when all 5 checks pass
Cannot complete financial closure with checks incomplete (400)
GET /api/settlement/dashboard shows completed lead with status 'financial_closure_completed'

critical_code_review_comments: settlement.py: Well-structured 569-line backend with clear settlement governance workflow

settlement.py: 8 settlement statuses correctly implemented (closure_ready → settlement_pending → collection_verification_pending → payable_commitments_pending → settlement_under_review → settlement_ready → settlement_blocked → financial_closure_completed)
settlement.py: Cross-phase handoff from execution closure_ready works correctly
settlement.py: handoff_summary auto-generated with booking_snapshot data, addenda count, incidents
settlement.py: event_closure_complete auto-checked on settlement handoff creation
settlement.py: Collection verification supports 5 statuses (pending, partial, received, verification_pending, verified)
settlement.py: Payable commitments support 3 completeness values (complete, partial, missing_data)
settlement.py: Dispute hold toggle works correctly with dispute_note
settlement.py: 5 payout readiness postures correctly implemented
settlement.py: Financial closure gate has 5 comprehensive checks
settlement.py: Financial closure completion correctly validates all 5 checks before allowing completion
settlement.py: Audit trail created for all settlement actions via create_audit_log
seed_data_creation: Created test lead which progressed through full pipeline: conversion intake → booking_confirmed → execution handoff → closure_ready → settlement handoff → financial_closure_completed. Created test data for settlement handoff, collection verification, payable commitments, payout readiness, settlement note, financial closure checks.
